source_pr.title: executor: fix data race with RandSeed
source_pr.body:

symptoms: executor: fix data race with RandSeed
failure_signature: executor: fix data race with RandSeed
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a data race on the global `executor.RandSeed`: tests and executor code could read/write this shared variable concurrently (race detector). This PR stabilizes it by using atomic load/store for `RandSeed` and updating tests to set it via `atomic.StoreInt64`.
fix_pattern: Use atomic operations for shared global `RandSeed` (atomic load/store) to eliminate concurrent read/write races; update tests to set it atomically.

evidence: evidence: executor: fix data race with RandSeed
